title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CGI India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CGI India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Chennai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CGI India Capital India:
CGI India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India Capital India!
